ingredients_text: 92% potatoes, 4% sunflower oil, 4% seasoned crispy coating (modified potato starch, seasoning [7% spices (garlic, onion, paprika, black pepper, cumin, cloves, oregano), salt, yeast extract, natural flavouring, thickener: xanthan gum, raising agent: sodium carbonates], rice flour, dextrin, salt, maltodextrin, raising agents: diphosphates, sodium carbonates, thickener: xanthan gum),
